message:
feat(session_correlation): Cx-first correlate_with_cass + correlate_and_persist_for_pane (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Expand Cx-first surface into session_correlation.rs. Routes the
cass subprocess calls through `search_sessions_with_cx` (tick
11/12) so caller cancellation propagates into the `cass` binary
invocation.

Additions (strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `correlate_with_cass_with_cx(cx, cass, project_path, agent,
    session_started_at_ms, options)` — Cx-first parallel of
    `correlate_with_cass`. Routes through
    `cass.search_sessions_with_cx` instead of
    `cass.search_sessions`. The override-session-id fast path
    short-circuits identically to the legacy function.

  * `correlate_and_persist_for_pane_with_cx(cx, storage, cass,
    pane_id, agent, session_started_at_ms, options)` —
    Cx-first parallel of `correlate_and_persist_for_pane`.
    Pre-flight checkpoint gates storage + cass work. Routes
    the cass call through `correlate_with_cass_with_cx` when
    override is absent. Post-correlation checkpoint brackets
    the cass call and the persist step so a cancel here can
    abort before the final `upsert_agent_session`.

Storage calls (`get_pane`, `select_session_record`,
`upsert_agent_session`) stay on the ambient path — StorageHandle
has no `_with_cx` siblings yet (147 storage async fns without
cx surface). Follow-on when storage.rs gains a trait or
_with_cx variants.

Regression test (new)
`correlate_and_persist_with_cx_override_updates_session`:

  * Mirrors the legacy `correlate_and_persist_override_updates_session`
    topology (temp sqlite, upsert pane + session, override
    session id).
  * Drives `correlate_and_persist_for_pane_with_cx(&cx, ...)`.
  * Asserts:
    - returned `correlation.status == Linked`
    - persisted `agent_session.external_id == "cass-override-cx"`
    - persisted `external_meta.is_some()`

Verification (local fork bypass):
  * session_correlation:: — 48 passed / 0 failed (tick 79: 47
    -> tick 80: 48, +1 new parity test; legacy
    `correlate_and_persist_override_updates_session` still
    green)
  * cargo build -p frankenterm-core --lib — clean (38.93s)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Cx-first session_correlation.rs progress after tick 80:
  * `correlate_with_cass`              ✓ (tick 80)
  * `correlate_and_persist_for_pane`   ✓ (tick 80)
  * `refresh_cass_summary_for_session` — pending (larger
    surface, TTL-gated refresh semantics)

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
